title: t@nuwphah #8573
definition:
1) swinging, waving, wave offering, offering
    1a) a swinging, brandishing
        1a1) of God's hand, weapons
    1b) waving, wave-offering (technical term of sacrifice)
    1c) offering (of gold or brass)
